title: Formula 1 98
short_description: PlayStation racing game based on the 1998 Formula One World Championship, developed by Visual Science and published by Psygnosis.
description: Formula 1 98 is a racing game developed by Visual Science and published by Psygnosis for the PlayStation. It is the sequel to Formula 1 97 and follows the 1998 Formula One World Championship, with official circuits, teams, and drivers — the first Formula One series entry not also released for Windows.
